name: QuantumScape Corp
summary: PART I Item 1. Bu siness. Overview QuantumScape is a leader in developing next-generation solid-state lithium-metal battery technology for EVs and other applications. QuantumScape Battery Inc. was founded in 2010 with the mission to revolutionize energy storage to enable a sustainable future. We are in the midst of a once-in-a-century shift in automotive powertrains, from ICE to clean EVs. After 30 years of gradual improvements in conventional lithium-ion batteries, the benefits of EVs have been...
